name: lobby
hints: The hotel lobby. There's a counter here.
GO COUN or LOOK COUN to check behind the counter.
Behind the counter is the cashbox treasure and a sign about room service.
GO COUN leads behind the counter (room 35) with cashbox. N=town (3), E=hotel room (27).
notes: Hotel lobby. GO COUN to go behind counter (room 35) for cashbox treasure. N=town (3), E=hotel room (27).
